title: Interpret Tote Exchange Settings Threshold Fields And Method Options
summary: Use the Tote Exchange Settings interface on the Aveva API page to identify the threshold field groups, method options, and weight-related parameters shown in the training source. This runbook is limited to viewing and documenting what is present on the screen.
when_to_use: Use when you need to verify or document which tote exchange threshold categories, method selections, and weight-related fields are shown on the Tote Exchange Settings screen in the source material.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to change Tote Exchange Settings.
Do not use this runbook to infer undocumented threshold meanings, calculations, or corrective actions.
Do not use this runbook as authority for queue threshold field names on the screen when those field names are not shown in the provided OCR evidence.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the Tote Exchange Settings interface or source image and identify the documented field names and method options shown by the source.

safety_notes: This runbook is limited to screen interpretation and documentation from the source.
Do not invent undocumented meanings, calculations, thresholds, or corrective actions from this source alone.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Tote Exchange Settings interface
Source screenshot or training material for comparison

access_required: Access to the Tote Exchange Settings interface
system_preconditions: The Tote Exchange Settings interface or the referenced training screenshot must be available for viewing.
external_references: Source screenshot or training material for comparison

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the Tote Exchange Settings interface with threshold fields, method options, and weight-related parameters.

steps.title: Open or view the Tote Exchange Settings interface
steps.purpose: Establish the correct screen for reference and comparison.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Tote Exchange Settings interface on the Aveva API page, or use the referenced training screenshot if direct screen access is not being used.
steps.expected_result: The Tote Exchange Settings interface is visible for review.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shown matches the Tote Exchange Settings interface described in the source.
steps.failure_condition: The Tote Exchange Settings interface is not available or the visible screen does not match the documented source screen.

actions.label: View Tote Exchange Settings screen
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Tote Exchange Settings interface on the Aveva API page.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall Tote Exchange Settings interface and listed threshold, method, and weight fields.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen does not show the documented Tote Exchange Settings interface.
The available screen cannot be matched to the source screenshot.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Tote Exchange Settings interface enables users to view and manage parameters related to the tote exchange process.

steps.title: Identify the threshold categories discussed by the source
steps.purpose: Confirm which threshold categories are described in the training material.
steps.instruction: Identify the tote exchange threshold categories shown or discussed by the source. Note pickup, priority, and close from the screen field names, and note that the transcript also mentions queue as part of the threshold discussion.
steps.expected_result: The threshold categories documented from the source are captured without adding unsupported interpretations.
steps.healthy_condition: Pickup, priority, and close are identified from the screen fields, and queue is noted only as transcript discussion context.
steps.failure_condition: The categories cannot be matched to the source or unsupported categories are inferred as screen fields.

actions.label: Review threshold categories
actions.exact_action: Identify the tote exchange threshold categories shown on the screen, including pickup, priority, and close, and note that the transcript also mentions queue as part of the threshold discussion.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Threshold field labels showing Pickup, Priority, and Close; compare with transcript mention of queue.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen does not show the documented threshold categories described in the source.
There is pressure to treat queue as a confirmed screen field name without source screen evidence.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: You have a queue, you have a pick up, a priority and a close... those are your thresholds.
Screen lists Cube Threshold Pickup, Cube Threshold Priority, Cube Threshold Close, Count Threshold Pickup, Count Threshold Priority, and Count Threshold Close.

steps.title: Locate cube threshold fields
steps.purpose: Verify the cube-based threshold field names present on the screen.
steps.instruction: Locate the cube-based threshold fields on the screen: Cube Threshold Pickup, Cube Threshold Priority, and Cube Threshold Close.
steps.expected_result: All documented cube threshold field names are identified from the source screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shows Cube Threshold Pickup, Cube Threshold Priority, and Cube Threshold Close.
steps.failure_condition: One or more documented cube threshold fields are missing from the viewed screen.

actions.label: Inspect cube threshold fields
actions.exact_action: Locate the cube-based threshold fields: Cube Threshold Pickup, Cube Threshold Priority, and Cube Threshold Close.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Cube Threshold Pickup, Cube Threshold Priority, and Cube Threshold Close field labels.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen does not show the documented cube threshold fields.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Screen lists Cube Threshold Pickup, Cube Threshold Priority, Cube Threshold Close, Count Threshold Pickup, Count Threshold Priority, and Count Threshold Close.

steps.title: Locate count threshold fields
steps.purpose: Verify the count-based threshold field names present on the screen.
steps.instruction: Locate the count-based threshold fields on the screen: Count Threshold Pickup, Count Threshold Priority, and Count Threshold Close.
steps.expected_result: All documented count threshold field names are identified from the source screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shows Count Threshold Pickup, Count Threshold Priority, and Count Threshold Close.
steps.failure_condition: One or more documented count threshold fields are missing from the viewed screen.

actions.label: Inspect count threshold fields
actions.exact_action: Locate the count-based threshold fields: Count Threshold Pickup, Count Threshold Priority, and Count Threshold Close.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Count Threshold Pickup, Count Threshold Priority, and Count Threshold Close field labels.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen does not show the documented count threshold fields.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Screen lists Cube Threshold Pickup, Cube Threshold Priority, Cube Threshold Close, Count Threshold Pickup, Count Threshold Priority, and Count Threshold Close.

steps.title: Verify method field options
steps.purpose: Confirm which tote exchange method options are documented by the source.
steps.instruction: Find the Method field and verify whether the documented options shown are Count, Cube, or Cube and Count.
steps.expected_result: The Method field and its documented options are identified from the source.
steps.healthy_condition: The Method field is present and the documented options Count, Cube, and Cube and Count are visible or supported by the source evidence.
steps.failure_condition: The Method field or its documented options cannot be confirmed from the viewed screen or source evidence.

actions.label: Inspect method options
actions.exact_action: Find the Method field and verify whether the documented options shown are Count, Cube, or Cube and Count.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Method field and the listed options Count, Cube, and Cube and Count.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Method field does not show the documented options described in the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The software has the ability to do it based off counts. And so the method is either counts cube or ... a mixture of both.
OCR lists Method with options Count, Cube, Cube and Count.

steps.title: Check weight-related parameters
steps.purpose: Confirm whether the source screen includes weight-related tote exchange parameters.
steps.instruction: Check whether Maximum Weight and Weight Threshold fields are present on the screen.
steps.expected_result: The documented weight-related parameters are confirmed from the source screen.
steps.healthy_condition: Maximum Weight and Weight Threshold are present on the screen.
steps.failure_condition: The documented weight-related fields are not visible on the viewed screen.

actions.label: Inspect weight parameters
actions.exact_action: Check whether Maximum Weight and Weight Threshold fields are present on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Maximum Weight and Weight Threshold field labels.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen does not show Maximum Weight or Weight Threshold as documented in the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Screen components include Maximum Weight and Weight Threshold.

steps.title: Record only the documented field names and options
steps.purpose: Ensure the output remains grounded to the source and does not add unsupported interpretation.
steps.instruction: Record the displayed threshold field names and method option shown by the source without inventing undocumented meanings or actions.
steps.expected_result: A source-grounded record of the field names and method options is produced.
steps.healthy_condition: The documentation lists only source-supported field names, categories, and options.
steps.failure_condition: The documentation adds unsupported meanings, calculations, corrective actions, or unverified field names.

actions.label: Document source-supported fields
actions.exact_action: Record the displayed threshold field names and method option shown by the source without inventing undocumented meanings or actions.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the screen as the authoritative reference for field names and visible options.

stop_or_escalate_if: You cannot document the fields without adding unsupported interpretation.
The screen does not show the documented threshold, method, or weight fields described in the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Screen lists Cube Threshold Pickup, Cube Threshold Priority, Cube Threshold Close, Count Threshold Pickup, Count Threshold Priority, and Count Threshold Close.
OCR lists Method with options Count, Cube, Cube and Count.
Screen components include Maximum Weight and Weight Threshold.

success_criteria: The Tote Exchange Settings interface is identified from the source.
The documented cube threshold fields are identified: Cube Threshold Pickup, Cube Threshold Priority, and Cube Threshold Close.
The documented count threshold fields are identified: Count Threshold Pickup, Count Threshold Priority, and Count Threshold Close.
The Method field options are identified as Count, Cube, and Cube and Count.
The weight-related parameters Maximum Weight and Weight Threshold are confirmed as present in the source.
The resulting notes remain limited to source-supported field names and options.
healthy_conditions: The viewed screen matches the Tote Exchange Settings interface shown in the training artifact.
Pickup, priority, and close threshold categories are visible through the documented field names.
Method options match the source evidence.
Weight-related parameters match the source evidence.
failure_conditions: The screen does not show the documented threshold, method, or weight fields described in the source.
The interface cannot be matched to the provided training artifact.
The reviewer attempts to infer undocumented threshold meanings, calculations, or corrective actions from this source alone.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the screen does not show the documented threshold, method, or weight fields described in the source.
Escalate if the available screen cannot be matched to the provided source artifact.
Escalate for SME review if interpretation would require undocumented meanings, calculations, or corrective actions.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Tote Exchange Settings interface showing threshold fields, method options, and weight-related parameters.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The Tote Exchange Settings interface enables users to view and manage parameters related to the tote exchange process.
Screen lists Cube Threshold Pickup, Cube Threshold Priority, Cube Threshold Close, Count Threshold Pickup, Count Threshold Priority, and Count Threshold Close.
OCR lists Method with options Count, Cube, Cube and Count.
Screen components include Maximum Weight and Weight Threshold.

missing_details: The source does not provide a navigation path to reach the Tote Exchange Settings interface.
The source does not define exact role boundaries beyond the candidate's L1_support assumption.
The source does not provide exact threshold values to use operationally in this runbook.
The source does not define the meaning or calculation logic for each threshold field.
The source does not provide corrective actions or change-control guidance for modifying these settings.
The source transcript mentions queue as part of threshold discussion, but the provided OCR evidence does not confirm a queue threshold field label on the screen.
